sourceTitle: Guidelines | AI Hub - StaffNet - The University of Manchester
evidenceSnippetOriginal: With approval at School level, this position may be broadened or narrowed for specific Course Units or assignments to encourage, require, or disallow specific uses of AI. In such cases students must be given detailed information that explains the rationale for the variation from the default position, as well as what is and is not allowed.
evidenceLocator: Teaching and Learning > Course unit variation
